prompt: A dynamic anime versus screen styled like a Pokémon battle intro, split diagonally into 2 opposing horizontal panels with a large metallic gold “VS” emblem in the center. The top panel has a hot pink speed-line background with black brushstroke borders and shows Rina Tennoji on the left, a teenage anime girl in a blue school uniform jacket, white shirt, and red ribbon tie, leaning in from the left with a confident expression, short layered pink hair with outward flips, and vivid yellow eyes. Beside her is 1 floating Porygon2-like creature, glossy red and blue with a rounded body, oval blue limbs, and a single circular yellow-and-black eye. On the right side of the top panel, large bold white text with a black outline reads “Rina Tennoji.” The bottom panel has a vivid purple speed-line background with black brushstroke borders and shows Hime Anyoji on the right, a teenage anime girl in a soft pink hoodie over a school-style outfit, posed with one hand near her chin, pastel pink hair in twin braided buns tied with dark bows. Her face is obscured by a large solid censor block rectangle. Beside her is 1 floating Magnezone-like robot creature, metallic silver and blue-gray with a domed body, 1 central red eye, 1 smaller side eye, a yellow antenna on top, and 2 horseshoe magnets as arms with red and blue tips. On the left side of the bottom panel, large bold white text with a black outline reads “Hime Anyoji.” Use crisp anime line art, glossy cel shading, dramatic motion streaks, high contrast, and a competitive game splash-screen composition on a black outer background. Include 2 characters, 2 creature companions, 2 name labels, 1 central VS emblem, and a small stylized white artist signature in the lower-left corner.
